reviews.comment:
NO TIENEN BAÑOS HABILITADOS! MANDAN AL CLIENTE A LA ESTACIÓN DE SERVICIO DE ENFRENTE! INCREIBLE!!!

reviews.comment:
Cargue combustible 2 veces, una vez me atendió un pibe que no tenía ni ganas, la segunda de 10

(Translated by Google)
I filled up twice; the first time I was served by a kid who didn't seem to care, the second time was excellent.

reviews.comment:
